snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgiaвҖӢвҖӢ

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-вҖӢвҖӢ...

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listвҖӢвҖӢ...

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listвҖӢвҖӢ...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagramвҖӢвҖӢ
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebookвҖӢвҖӢ
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficialвҖӢвҖӢ
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitterвҖӢвҖӢ
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeвҖӢвҖӢ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaвҖӢ #FutureNostalgiaвҖӢ #Grammys

snippet.title: Parque aquГЎtico DIY de papelГЈo para um Hamster!
snippet.description:
OlГЎ! AtГ© mesmo os hamsters precisam se divertir Г s vezes! Гү por isso que hoje estamos num Гіtimo clima de verГЈo! EntГЈo, vamos fazer um incrГӯvel parque aquГЎtico para um hamster! 

Vamos precisar de muito papelГЈo para um entretenimento assim. ComeГ§amos fazendo um elevador. Para isso, vamos colocar as colunas e a cabine com vidro acrГӯlico entre elas. Para fazer o elevador se mover, usaremos as engrenagens, o motor e os botГөes. TambГ©m faremos vГЎrios escorregadores de diferentes alturas e formas, e uma ponte suspensa especial que os conectarГЎ. E, claro, precisamos de uma piscina! O PaГ§oca nГЈo suporta ГЎgua de verdade, por isso vamos substituГӯ-la por um piso de poliГ©ster. Colocaremos luzes ao redor do perГӯmetro para iluminar nossa piscina. Depois de escorregar na ГЎgua e nadar na piscina, Г© o momento perfeito para relaxar. EntГЈo, vamos fazer uma zona de recreaГ§ГЈo! Aqui vocГӘ pode relaxar em um confortГЎvel deck de sol com um coquetel em suas mГЈos! Nas proximidades, hГЎ uma quadra de vГҙlei para os verdadeiros fГЈs de esportes!

EntГЈo, terminamos o parque aquГЎtico para o nosso hamster PaГ§oca! Se vocГӘ quiser torcer por seu animal de estimaГ§ГЈo, tente fazer o seu prГіprio parque!

snippet.title: Giveon - Heartbreak Anniversary (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:

Twitter:  https://twitter.com/giveon?lang=en

Lyrics:
Ooh

Balloons are deflated
Guess they look lifeless like me
We miss you on your side of the bed, mmm
Still got your things here
And they stare at me like souvenirs
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me, but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life?

I get like this every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary
'Cause I remember every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary, do you ever think of me?
(Oh-ooh) No
(Ooh) No, no, no
(Ooh, ooh) Ooh, nah (Ooh)

I'm buildin' my hopes up
Like presents unopened to this day
I still see the messages you read, mmm
I'm foolishly patient (Foolishly patient)
Can't get past the taste of your lips (Taste of your lips)
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life? (My life)

I get like this every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary
'Cause I remember every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary, do you ever think of me?
(Oh-ooh) Of me
(Ooh) 'Cause I think of you, think of you
(Ooh, ooh, ooh-ooh)

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agencyвҖҷs website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

Go watch JimвҖҷs video to see how he located the scammers and subscribe to his channel- 
https://youtu.be/Xvjjpzyiig4

Go sub to Perogi with Scammer Payback too- 
https://youtube.com/c/ScammerPayback

New music this time from the talented Laura Shigihara- https://open.spotify.com/track/1zOzvy6SeVJs2MEET7vyCW?si=f3fee98828fa4802

snippet.title: New Amsterdam 3 | Quintas Г s 22:20 | FOX Life
snippet.description:
вҖңComo Г© que posso ajudar?вҖқ Гү o lema do New Amsterdam desde que Max Goodwin se tornou diretor clГӯnico do hospital. 
Na terceira temporada, Max e a sua equipa tГӘm de manter a firmeza o otimismo enquanto lidam com uma pandemia que expГөe as abissais desigualdades nos serviГ§os de saГәde americanos. Max jГЎ nГЈo quer apenas consertar um sistema fragmentado, ele quer deitar abaixo e construir algo novo. Este Г© um regresso em forГ§a de um dos mais aclamados dramas mГ©dicos dos Гәltimos anos.

snippet.title: LIVE: GRAMMY Awards Premiere Ceremony | March 14 at 3pm ET / 12pm PT
snippet.description:
MusicвҖҷs Biggest Night kicks off with the Premiere Ceremony, featuring 8 special performances and more than 70 GRAMMYs awarded across music genres ranging from classical and jazz to R&B, Global music and more. 

Hosted by current three-time GRAMMY nominee JhenГ© Aiko, the Premiere Ceremony will feature a number of performances by current GRAMMY nominees, including: Nigerian singer, songwriter and rapper Burna Boy, jazz band Terri Lyne Carrington + Social Science, blues musician Jimmy "Duck" Holmes, classical pianist Igor Levit, Latin electropop musician Lido Pimienta, singer, songwriter and performance artist Poppy, and singer, songwriter and composer Rufus Wainwright. 

Kicking off the event will be a tribute performance celebrating the 50th anniversary of the classic Marvin Gaye track "Mercy, Mercy Me (The Ecology)". The special all-nominee ensemble performance will feature Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra, Thana Alexa, John Beasley, Camilo, Regina Carter, Alexandre Desplat, Bebel Gilberto, Lupita Infante, Sarah Jarosz, Mykal Kilgore, Ledisi, Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez, PJ Morton, Gregory Porter, Grace Potter, sГӨje, Gustavo Santaolalla (Bajofondo), Anoushka Shankar, and Kamasi Washington. 

All of the Premiere Ceremony performers and the host are nominated this year, as are most of the presenters. Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra for Best Latin Jazz Album (Tradiciones); Aiko for Album Of The Year (Chilombo), Best R&B Performance ("Lightning & Thunder" featuring John Legend) and Best Progressive R&B Album (Chilombo); Alexa for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Ona); Beasley with Somi With Frankfurt Radio Big Band for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Holy Room: Live At Alte Oper), Best Large Jazz Ensemble Album (MONK'estra Plays John Beasley), Best Arrangement, Instrumental or A Cappella ("Donna Lee") and Best Arrangement, Instrumentals and Vocals ("Asas Fechadas" with Maria Mendes); Burna Boy for Best Global Music Album (Twice As Tall); Burr for Best Comedy Album (Paper Tiger); Camilo for Best Latin Pop or Urban Album (Por Primera Vez); Carrington + Social Science for Best Jazz Instrumental Album (Waiting Game); Carter for Best Improvised Jazz Solo ("Pachamama"); Chika for Best New Artist; Desplat for Best Instrumental Composition ("Plumfield"); Gilberto for Best Global Music Album (Agora); Holmes for Best Traditional Blues Album (Cypress Grove); Infante for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (La Serenata); Jarosz for Best American Roots Song ("Hometown"), Best Americana Album (World On The Ground); Kilgore for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Let Me Go"); Ledisi for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Anything For You"); Levit for Best Classical Instrumental Solo (Beethoven: Complete Piano Sonatas); Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (Bailando Sones Y Huapangos Con Mariachi Sol De Mexico De Jose Hernandez); Morton for Best Gospel Album (Gospel According To PJ); Pimienta for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Miss Colombia); Poppy for Best Metal Performance ("BLOODMONEY"); Porter for Best R&B Album (All Rise); Potter for Best Rock Performance ("Daylight"), Best Rock Album (Daylight); sГӨje for Best Arrangement, Instruments and Vocals ("Desert Song"); Santaolalla with Bajofondo for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Aura); Shankar for Best Global Music Album (Love Letters); Wainwright for Best Traditional Pop Vocal Album (Unfollow The Rules); and Washington for Best Score Soundtrack For Visual Media (Becoming).

snippet.title: вҷ« QUEM VAI GANHAR A CHAMPIONS LEAGUE? | ParГіdia Wild Thoughts - DJ Khaled, Rihanna, Bryson Tiller
snippet.description:
Uma parГіdia de futebol da mГәsica "Wild Thoughts" do Dj Khaled com Rihanna e Bryson Tyler. Гү rapaz, saiu o confronto das quartas de final da Champ Champ, vai ser sГі jogГЈo absurdo viu! City, Borussia, Real Madrid, Porto, Chelsea, Liverpool, PSG, Bayern, uma enchente de craques e talento que nГЈo acaba mais! E aГӯ, quem vai vencer essa Champions League? Comenta aГӯ!

Bora seguir nossas redes? =)

рҹ‘Қ INSTAGRAM:
https://instagram.com/dezaofutparodias
https://instagram.com/leonwhosoever

рҹ’» EdiГ§ГЈo: Canal iFutMagic
Link: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCn7BfZqsZ6ZyWM1EOzsbelw

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LETRA:

Гү Champions....
Гү Champions League!
NinguГ©m pega!

Champions Г© um trem da peste
Se nГЈo vamos ver CR7 e Messi
NГіs vamo ter os baby, baby, baby
E os outros craque acelerando igual Mercedes
 
Reds vem com fГ© numa dupla
De africanos que sГЈo bom para xuxu
E se um grupГЈo tГЎ dodГіi
Sempre cresce na Champ-Champ o Liverpool

Borussia vem com uma receita:
FГ© na brocagem do Cometa
E alГ©m do Haalandinho e uns muleks
Tem o Hazard na versГЈo boa com os pГ©s

Qual time vai aguentar parar o City?
TГЎ cheio de gГЎs, movido a dinamite
Гү lГӯder isolado lГЎ na Premier League
Pep vГӘ a taГ§a e tem um surto de apetite
Os cara vem...

Pra ganhar
Pra ganhar o troГ§o
Pra ganhar
Geral na luta pra conquistar o troГ§o
Pra ganhar
Geral na luta pra conquistar o troГ§o

Ayy, uh uh
LГЎ da BavГЎria tГЎ vindo um trem
TГЎ vindo o Bayern do elenco cervejeiro
Com um monstro artilheiro-lheiro
Que quer outra Champions em seu leito (leito)

Porto tem seus truques (truques)
Pepe cheio de saГәde (-Гәde)
JГЎ deram um xablau na Juve
TГЎ bolado o DragГЈo PortuguГӘs (oh yeyeah)

O Real nГЈo vinha muy bien (muy bien)
Mas Г© copeiro o Zizou, hein (zu, hein)
Tem muita estrela na trupe
E um deus do dibre que nГЈo acerta um chute em rede

O Chelsea tГЎ o aГ§o com o Tuchel, baby
Quer papar o trofГ©u e ficar de bucho cheio, baby
SerГЎ que o Chelsea volta a ser aquele?
Com a mulekada em modo crazy?

Dessa vez serГЎ que dГЎ bom
Pro bonde do Paris que tГЎ on?
Com o mito Mbamar
Com o Ney que vai voltar tunado no angu (cheio de angu)
E um bondГЈo nervoso (nervoso)

Geral na luta pra conquistar o troГ§o
Pra ganhar
Pra ganhar o troГ§o
Pra ganhar
Geral na luta pra conquistar o troГ§o
Pra ganhar
Geral na luta pra conquistar o troГ§o

snippet.title: President Biden falls on Air Force One stairs
snippet.description:
President Joe Biden has fallen on the stairs of Air Force One while boarding the aircraft.

Mr Biden, who was on his way to Atlanta, appeared unhurt and carried on unaided.

snippet.title: вҷ« NOVA ERA NA CHAMPIONS: MESSI E CR7 FORA! | ParГіdia M4 - Teto, MatuГӘ
snippet.description:
Uma parГіdia de futebol da mГәsica "M4" do Teto com o MatuГӘ. Messi e Cristiano Ronaldo caГӯram juntos nas oitavas de final dessa ediГ§ГЈo de Champions League! As duas lendas nГЈo estarГЈo presentes nas prГіximas fases, que ediГ§ГЈo doida, serГЎ que acabou a era deles? Enquanto isso, MbappГ© e Haaland deitaram e se garantiram nas quartas, quem serГЎ que leva?

Bora seguir nossas redes? =)

рҹ‘Қ INSTAGRAM:
https://instagram.com/dezaofutparodias
https://instagram.com/leonwhosoever
https://instagram.com/FutParodias

рҹ‘Қ TWITTER:
https://twitter.com/dezaodrumond
https://twitter.com/leonwhosoever
https://twitter.com/FutParodias

рҹ‘Қ FACEBOOK:
https://facebook.com/dezaodrumond
https://facebook.com/leonwhosoever
https://facebook.com/FutParodias

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

рҹҺј Playback: Singer! KaraokГӘ
Link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AVwm5IP6iOI&t=63s
рҹ’» EdiГ§ГЈo: Canal iFutMagic
Link: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCn7BfZqsZ6ZyWM1EOzsbelw

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LETRA:

Hahaha
Mano, Champions Г© o bicho, vГ©i
Na oitava jГЎ deu tchau pro Messi
E pro Gajo, tГЎ ligado? Hahaha

Uh, uh, wow

Quem que nГЈo gosta de Champions League?
Гү talento jorrando da fonte
E se as lendas caГӯram da ponte
A meninada assume a fronte

Quem quer ver gol Г© sГі olhar pro Haaland
Ou entГЈo vГӘ o MbappГ© da janela
O Cris e o AnГЈo jГЎ nГЈo estГЈo mais naquela
Como Г© triste, tГЈo ficando banguela...

Mano, ninguГ©m para o Haalandinho
Faz tanto gol, parece o Dimba
Eu vou chamar ele de HaalandГЈo
Гү a nova mГЎquina de brocaГ§ГЈo

Deu no Sevilla igual o King Kong
4 gol do menor (slatt)
Гү o artilheiro com folga e com o dom
De quem broca sem dГі (ye)
Chegou nos 100 gols mais veloz que o som

O VAR vГӘ o Haaland e logo se mela
Marca um penal e repete se erra
Гү que o mundo conspira por mais gol do fera
O RobГҙ vГӘ o cria e sente inveja

Ahn, ahn, ahn, hmm (hmm)
O Cris queria um...
Pouquinho da juventude
Do Haalandinho, uhum

Гү que Gajo sofreu em Turim
Foi pra campo morrendo de fome
Na verdade eu quase nem vi o ome
Tava brincando de pique-esconde?

Foi o Chiesa quem jogou com alma
Mas nГЈo deu, o Porto papou a Velha
Na base da raГ§a e com fogo na goela
Fez do Cristi um churrasquinho de panela

O time azul (crГ©u)
Com menos um
Foi persistente
E saiu contente

Porto deu vapo
No bumbum do gajo
VovГҙ Cris cansado
Foi eliminado 

Hmm, hmm, hmm
Champ-Champ, meu caro
Hmm, hmm, hmm
Гү um troГ§o brabo
Hmm, hmm, hmm
Hehehe (hum)
Hmm, hmm, hmm (huh)

E os Reds tГЈo como? (Quer ver?)

Meteram um 2-0, atГ© que foi magrinho
Dava pra golear o time dos boizinho
O PoolzГЈo da Massa foi bonzinho
Mas sГі que o bom mesmo foi o Fabinho

Mole pros Reds, mano
E pro Red que Г© o Bull, nem tanto
A boiada voltou pro curral
O Red Bull criou asa e deu tchau
(Valeu, tchau, fui, ahn)

E o BarГ§a jogou com a vida
Nem esperava que fosse assim
Messi raivoso acertou uma bomba (meu Deus)
Com raiva de sГі jogar sozinho

Mano, o DembГ©le jogou quinhentas chances fora
Fica difГӯcil assim
Mas quando um penal surgiu pro AnГЈozinho
Bateu pior que o Giruim

TГЎ que o Navas jogou igual Jesus
Salvando tudo
Estava quente
Onipotente

Paris vem brabo
Com um time pesado
Nem gastou o Neymago

SerГЎ que dГЎ pro Paris?

snippet.title: Miley Cyrus - Angels Like You (Official Video)
snippet.description:
MileyвҖҷs New Album Plastic Hearts is Available Now: https://mileyl.ink/PlasticHearts

Instagram: https://mileyl.ink/instagram 
Snapchat: https://mileyl.ink/snapchat 
Tiktok: https://mileyl.ink/tiktok 
Site: http://www.mileycyrus.com

LYRICS
Flowers in hand, waiting for me 
Every word in poetry 
WonвҖҷt call me by name, only baby 
The more that you give the less that I 
Need everyone says I look happy 
When it feels right

I know that youвҖҷre wrong for me
Gonna wish we never met on the day I leave
I brought you down to your knees 
вҖҳCause they say that misery loves company 
It's not your fault I ruin everything
And itвҖҷs not youвҖҷre fault I canвҖҷt be what you need
Baby 
Angels like you canвҖҷt fly down here with me 
IвҖҷm everything they said I would be

(La La la)
IвҖҷm everything they said I would be

IвҖҷll put you down slow
Love you goodbye 
before you let go, just one more time
Take off youвҖҷre clothes
pretend that itвҖҷs fine
A little more hurt wonвҖҷt kill you 
tonight mama says you donвҖҷt look happy 
Close your eyes 

I know that youвҖҷre wrong for me
Gonna wish we never met on the day I leave
I brought you down to your knees 
вҖҳCause they say that misery loves company 
It's not your fault I ruin everything
And itвҖҷs not youвҖҷre fault I canвҖҷt be what you need
Baby 
Angels like you canвҖҷt fly down here with me 
IвҖҷm everything they said I would be

I know that youвҖҷre wrong for me
Gonna wish we never met on the day I leave
I brought you down to your knees 
вҖҳCause they say that misery loves company 
It's not your fault I ruin everything
And itвҖҷs not youвҖҷre fault I canвҖҷt be what you need
Baby 
Angels like you canвҖҷt fly down here with me 
IвҖҷm everything they said I would be

snippet.title: The Voice of Nepal Season 3 - 2021 - Episode 1
snippet.description:
аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨӘаӨ°аҘҚаӨ§аҘҖаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒаӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨӣаӨҫаӨЁаӨҝаӨЁ аӨ—аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨ№аҘӢ, аӨ•аҘӢаӨҡаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒаӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨӣаӨҫаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ—аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨ№аҘӢ | The Voice of Nepal аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҜаӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ аӨңаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ°аӨ®аӨҫаӨҮаӨІаҘӢ аӨ№аҘҒаӨЁаҘҮаӨӣ аӨӨаҘҚаӨҜаӨӨаӨҝаӨЁаҘҲ аӨҡаҘҒаӨЁаҘҢаӨӨаҘҖаӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҚаӨЈ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ, аӨҶаӨң аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝ аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨ• аӨ¶аҘҒаӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨ¬аӨҫаӨ° аӨ° аӨ¶аӨЁаӨҝаӨ¬аӨҫаӨ° аӨ¬аҘҮаӨІаҘҒаӨ•аӨҫ аҘ® аӨ¬аӨңаҘҮ аӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨ№аӨҝаӨ®аӨҫаӨІаӨҜ аӨҹаҘҮаӨІаӨҝаӨӯаӨҝаӨңаӨЁаӨ®аӨҫ

snippet.title: Justin Bieber: Tiny Desk (Home) Concert
snippet.description:
More from NPR Music: 
Tiny Desk Concerts: https://www.npr.org/tinydeskвҖӢ
Twitter: https://twitter.com/nprmusicвҖӢ
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nprmusic

More from Justin Bieber:
"Peaches" Video: https://justinbieber.lnk.to/PeachesVid
Justice The Album Out Now: https://justinbieber.lnk.to/Justice  

The Tiny Desk is working from home for the foreseeable future. Introducing NPR Music's Tiny Desk (home) concerts, bringing you performances from across the country and the world. It's the same spirit вҖ” stripped-down sets, an intimate setting вҖ” just a different space.

Stephen Thompson | March 17, 2021
If you were to apply one of those "how it started / how it's going" memes to Tiny Desk (home) concerts вҖ” which began, it turns out, almost exactly one year ago вҖ” you'd have, under "how it's going," the image of pop superstar Justin Bieber as he and his band perform the world premiere of a new song called "Peaches."

"Peaches" will exist in a significantly different form when Bieber drops his new album Justice on Friday вҖ” the track will feature guest vocals from GIVEЕҢN and Daniel Caesar вҖ” just as "Holy," another song from Justice, opens this set without the presence of guest Chance the Rapper. But Bieber's Tiny Desk set, performed with the aid of We the Band, provides the fullest taste yet (fully 25 percent!) of the singer's sixth album, whose singles have already been streamed hundreds of millions of times.

Bieber has had a massive month as he prepares for Justice to drop: March 2021 began with the singer's 27th birthday and recently produced his second career Grammy, as he took the prize for best country duo or group performance for "10,000 Hours" with Dan + Shay. It continues with this, his Tiny Desk debut. Friday, the next chapter officially begins.

SET LIST
"Holy"
"Peaches"
"Hold On"
"Anyone"

MUSICIANS
Justin Bieber: vocals, keys
Harv: bass
O'Neil "Doctor O" Palmer: keys
DJ Tay James: DJ
Robert Taylor: drums
Julian McGuire: guitar

CREDITS
Video: Nick Demoura, Mike Drew, Rory Kramer, Aaron Kroger, James Coker
Audio: Jim Ebdon, Dylan Ely, James Roach, Chris Houghton, Taylor Meyer
Production Manager: Chris Gratton
Camera Operators: Austin Wavra, Daniel Mardoyan, Noel Galan
Lighting Tech: Jim Mecsery

TINY DESK TEAM
Producer: Bobby Carter
Video Producers: Maia Stern, Morgan Noelle Smith
Audio Mastering: Josh Rogosin
Tiny Production Team: Bob Boilen, Kara Frame
Executive Producer: Lauren Onkey
Senior VP, Programming: Anya Grundmann

#justinbieber #tinydesk #nprmusic #pop #rnb

snippet.title: Entrevista com Delegado da Cunha | The Noite (09/03/21)
snippet.description:
Em uma entrevista a Danilo Gentili, o convidado, que se considera um policial firme e rigoroso, grava um VT com a equipe do programa para mostrar como se faz uma batida policial e recorda como surgiu o apelido вҖңTio da CunhaвҖқ. Ele revela qual sua operaГ§ГЈo preferida atГ© hoje e explica que as aГ§Гөes sГЈo uma pequena parte da profissГЈo, jГЎ que o resto Г© composto de investigaГ§Гөes e campanas. Da Cunha fala ainda sobre os vГӯdeos com maior nГәmero de visualizaГ§Гөes, dГЎ sua opiniГЈo sobre a legislaГ§ГЈo do paГӯs e relembra outras histГіrias marcantes de sua trajetГіria.
____________________________________________________________
O The Noite Г© um talk show apresentado por Danilo Gentili e vai ao ar de segunda a sexta nas madrugadas do SBT. Personalidades de todas as ГЎreas sГЈo entrevistadas no programa, que tambГ©m conta com LГ©o Lins, Murilo Couto, a assistente de palco Juliana e o locutor Diguinho Coruja. A trilha sonora fica por conta da banda Ultraje a Rigor e os comentГЎrios sГЈo cortesia do vocalista Roger Moreira. Completam o grupo o baixista Mingau, o guitarrista Marcos Kleine e o baterista Bacalhau.

Veja mais em http://www.sbt.com.br/thenoite/

Inscreva-se no canal do The Noite: http://www.youtube.com/sbtthenoite

Curta a pГЎgina do programa no Facebook:  
https://www.facebook.com/SBTTheNoite

Siga o perfil oficial do programa no Twitter:

https://twitter.com/SBTTheNoite

E no Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/sbtthenoite

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and HarryвҖҷs Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines wonвҖҷt be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs 
44:03 The Moment: From Prairies to Bollywood

Subscribe to The National: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/CBCTheNational?sub_confirmation=1

Twitter | https://twitter.com/CBCTheNational

More from CBC News | https://www.cbc.ca/news

The National is CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism, with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang in Toronto, Ian Hanomansing in Vancouver and the CBC's chief political correspondent, Rosemary Barton in Ottawa.

snippet.title: "1 de MarГ§o" - ParГіdia (7 rings - Ariana Grande)
snippet.description:
Para celebrar o dia 1 de marГ§o e os meus 22 anos decidi fazer esta parГіdia! рҹҳң  Espero mesmo, MESMO, que adorem!

рҹ“– O MEU LIVRO: podem encontrГЎ-lo em todas as lojas da Fnac, Bertrand e Note de Portugal! рҹҳң

рҹ‘ҡ O MEU MERCH: https://www.mafaldacreative.pt/вҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ

As Minhas Redes Sociais:

вӯҗпёҸ INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/mafaldacreative/

вӯҗпёҸ TIKTOK: https://vm.tiktok.com/ny5gcX/вҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ

вӯҗпёҸ TWITTER: https://mobile.twitter.com/MafaldaCreative

рҹ‘©рҹҸ»вҖҚрҹ’» COLABORAГҮГ•ES/PARCERIAS
e-mail: mafaldacreative.info@gmail.com

CrГ©ditos:
ProduГ§ГЈo (MГәsica) - ReaLit
Letra - Mafalda Creative e JoГЈo Direitinho
RealizaГ§ГЈo - Ruben Do Valle
DireГ§ГЈo de Fotografia - AndrГ© Pega
1 Ass. Camera - Marta Dias Coelho
Gafter - Ricardo Giglio
Produtor - Ruben Do Valle
Ass. de ProduГ§ГЈo - Ines AraГәjo
Styling - Table For Three
MakeUp - That's Du
Edit - Marta Dias Coelho
Color Grade - AndrГ© Pega
ProduГ§ГЈo - RecOdd
Cast - Madalena Rodrigues, Maria Cunha, Beatriz Pereira, Diogo Pinto, Maria GirГЈo, Rita Gil, Daniel Iyrio, Edson Walter

Agradecimentos:
- MaguiCakes
- Hotel Chafariz d'el Rei
- Manuel Batalha

Letra:

"Finalmente chegou dia 1 de marГ§o 
Depois de um ano que foi um fracasso 
Mas desta data jГЎ ninguГ©m se esquece
SГЈo os 22 da rainha da net 

VГЈo ser sГі chamadas durante o dia
Tias e primas que eu nem conhecia 
Mas nГЈo faz mal porque ninguГ©m se esquece 
SГЈo os anos da rainha da net 

Festa jГЎ tenho 
Na casa de banho 
AtГ© convidei 
O rei do rebanho 
A mГЈe Г© de Beja
O pai Г© nortenho
Veio de propГіsito
SГі para os meus anos

Eu quero, eu tenho
O rei do rebanho 
Veio de propГіsito 
SГі para os anos
Mas nГЈo faz mal porque ninguГ©m se esquece 
Que SГЈo os anos da rainha da net 

Todos vГЈo estar a por fotos comigo
Podres do Whatsapp dos grupo de amigos 
Mas desta data jГЎ ninguГ©m se esquece 
SГЈo os 22 da rainha da net

Prendas e bolo de aniversГЎrio 
Malta que eu jГЎ nГЈo via desdo infantГЎrio 
Mas nГЈo faz mal porque ninguГ©m se esquece  
SГЈo os anos da Rainha da net 

Cabelo lavado,
Com shampoo barato 
Que eu comprei nos saltos 
Do supermercado 
Outfit foi dado
No Natal passado 
Furei as orelhas  
Doeu um bocado 

Eu quero, eu tenho
O rei do rebanho
Veio de propГіsito 
SГі para os meus anos 
Mas nГЈo faz mal porque ninguГ©m se esquece 
Que SГЈo os anos da rainha da net 

E todos pensam que eu tenho 12 anos 
Mas jГЎ sГЈo 22 este ano 
Tenho a mesma cara ya para aГӯ 
desde os meus 8 anos 
I donвҖҷt give a damn para as fotos do Instagram
Estou-me a preparar porque vem aГӯ o rap..

Ups! Estou sempre a aparecer nas News
Por causa das minhas views
CГЎ no YouTube 
JГЎ conhecem o percurso 
AtГ© jГЎ acabei o curso 
As copycats na internet 
Tentam ser como, a rainha da net 
Com orГ§amentos a bater no teto 
Mas o budget nГЈo compra o sucesso

Eu quero, eu tenho
O rei do rebanho
Veio de propГіsito 
SГі para os meus anos 
Mas nГЈo faz mal porque ninguГ©m se esquece 
Que SГЈo os anos da rainha da net"

Obrigada por tudo! вқӨпёҸ

snippet.title: Highlights | Resumo: SC Braga 0-2 Benfica (Liga 20/21 #24)
snippet.description:
#VSPORTS #LigaNOS #LigaPortugal #JogasMuito
Triunfo do Benfica por 2-0 no terreno do Braga, no jogo que encerra a 24.ВӘ jornada da Liga NOS. Com os golos de Rafa (47') e Seferovic (57') a equipa encarnada consegue assim subir ao terceiro lugar do campeonato, por troca com a equipa minhota.

snippet.title: As revelaГ§Гөes da entrevista de Harry e Meghan a Oprah
snippet.description:
A aguardada entrevista do prГӯncipe Harry e Meghan Markle com Oprah Winfrey foi ao ar nos Estados Unidos no domingo (7/3). Nela, o casal deu seu lado da histГіria sobre a vida na FamГӯlia Real.

O duque e a duquesa de Sussex falaram sobre seus relacionamentos com outros membros da realeza, racismo e como sua saГәde mental foi prejudicada.

Meghan conversou com Oprah durante a maior parte da entrevista, antes de se juntar ao PrГӯncipe Harry. 

Entre as afirmaГ§Гөes, estГЎ a de que um integrante da FamГӯlia Real demonstrou preocupaГ§ГЈo com a cor da pele do bebГӘ do casal e a de que Meghan chegou a ter pensamentos suicidas, mas foi impedida de procurar ajuda.

Veja tambГ©m a versГЈo em texto: https://www.bbc.com/portuguese/internacional-56298781

Curtiu? Inscreva-se no canal da BBC News Brasil! E se quiser ler mais notГӯcias, clique aqui:  www.bbc.co.uk/portuguese

#BBCNewsBrasil #MeghanMarkle #PrГӯncipeHarry

snippet.title: GRAMMYs 2021: Harry Styles Sings Watermelon Sugar in ELECTRIFYING Performance
snippet.description:
Harry Styles can take a bow after his first award win and debut performance at the 63rd annual GRAMMY Awards, which aired on CBS. The 27-year-old singer won Best Pop Solo Performance for his song 'Watermelon Sugar,' which he performed live earlier in the broadcast. Harry's first GRAMMY win was met with applause from his fellow nominees, including Billie Eilish and Taylor Swift, who dated Harry in 2012.

#GRAMMYs2021

snippet.title: The Harry-Meghan-Oprah Interview Is All the Buzz

And James gives us a handsy tutorial on how to milk a cow. After, Reggie Watts attempts to explain NFT art to James, who cannot pronounce "indistinguishable."

snippet.title: Jimmy Kimmel on Meghan & HarryвҖҷs Shocking Interview with Oprah
snippet.description:
Oprah made her TV return with Meghan and Harry in a riveting two hour interview about drama with the Royal Family, the reaction from the UK was fierce, the Senate passed President BidenвҖҷs $1.9 trillion COVID relief package, the CDC announced that those who have been fully vaccinated can gather indoors with smaller groups, Donald Trump doesnвҖҷt want the RNC and Republican committees using his name and likeness to raise money, Pope Francis visited the top ShiвҖҷite Cleric of Iraq to send a message of peace between the Catholic and Muslim worlds, it was fantasy suite night on вҖңThe BachelorвҖқ and love was in the air, and Jimmy chats with the editor of the conservative blog вҖңThe Daily RageвҖқ who is leading a protest against Space JamвҖҷs new depiction of Lola Bunny.

snippet.title: 10 MIN BEST OF HIIT - a compilation of the best parts of my HIIT workouts - INTENSE I Pamela Reif
snippet.description:
SUCH A KILLER ROUTINE - but you won't notice while you're training (because it's also kind of happy). I was dripping sweat after only 1 round! вҷҘпёҺ Cardio is fun today! / Werbung

omg I am so exciteeeeeed! 
A combination of your (and my :D) favorite parts of the 15min Happy Dance, 12min Happy Sweat, 12min Happy Cardio & 10min R&B Dance. Basically, it's mostly about the last, super high energy songs! The parts that we put all our energy into, that we sweat it all out & feel so happy afterwards. 

This is my favorite HIIT workout ever now. It's SUPER DUPER intense, will kick your ass, but it will also kick the 12min Happy Cardio from it's throne haha. At least for my personal taste. Let me know what you think!!! 

в–ё burn lots of calories 
в–ё improve your endurance 
в–ё main muscles worked: thighs, butt, abs (from all the high knees)
в–ё boost your mood & just be happyyyyy

PS: thanks for helping me decide about the workout parts on Insta Stories! Always love to do whatever you like best :))

__

Apart form the good mood & I can also guarantee a serious number of burned calories here. 

в–ё I burned 90kcal in those 10min (which is a loooooot). 
Depending on your height, weight and fitness level this might vary between 80-160kcal. 

__

в–ё you can find FREE WORKOUT PLANS on my Instagram Channel. 30min, 45min and Beginner Friendly combinations. Check out the Highlight Bubble "Workout Plans" for that.  

вһһ Instagram http://www.instagram.com/pamela_rf/
use #PamelaReif if you want me to see your workout pics and videos! 

в–ё my Pam App вҷҘпёҺ Free workout plans, recipes & tips: 
https://appurl.io/5Exh2D1Uo 

__
 
I update my workout playlist weekly & it's available on Spotify, Apple Music, etc. вҷҘпёҺ
http://wmg.click/GetActive

1. David Guetta feat. Nicki Minaj, Bebe Rexha & Afrojack - Hey Mama  
2. Sam And The Womp - Bom Bom   
3. Parx feat. NonГҙ - Feel Right Now
4. Ciara - Level Up 

__

Business Contact:
pamela_reif@icloud.com

__
unterstГјtzt durch Warner Music Germany

Disclaimer:
When joining me for this workout video, you need to take some precautions as your health and safety is the most important. To avoid any injury or harm, you need to check your health with your doctor before exercising. By performing any fitness exercises without supervision like with this video, you are performing them at your own risk. See a fitness professional to give you advice on your exercise form. Pamela Reif will not be responsible or liable for any injury or harm you sustain as a result of this video.

snippet.title: An Afternoon with Prince Harry & James Corden
snippet.description:
Now that the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are settled into Southern California, James Corden thought it was time to show his friend Prince Harry the sights. From tea on an open top bus to visiting the "Fresh Prince of Bel Air" mansion, Prince Harry gets the tour he never dreamed of. Special thanks to Spartan for providing an incredible Spartan Race Obstacle Course to run. Learn more: spartan.com

More Late Late Show:
Subscribe: http://bit.ly/CordenYouTube
Watch Full Episodes: http://bit.ly/1ENyPw4
Facebook: http://on.fb.me/19PIHLC
Twitter: http://bit.ly/1Iv0q6k
Instagram: http://bit.ly/latelategram

Watch The Late Late Show with James Corden weeknights at 12:35 AM ET/11:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
On Wednesday, March 3, Starship serial number (SN10) successfully completed SpaceXвҖҷs third high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas.

Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 was powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee вҖ“ approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 performed a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype descended under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps were actuated by an onboard flight computer to control StarshipвҖҷs attitude during flight and enabled a precise landing at the intended location. SN10вҖҷs Raptor engines reignited as the vehicle performed the landing flip maneuver immediately before successfully touching down on the landing pad! 

As if the flight test was not exciting enough, SN10 experienced a rapid unscheduled disassembly shortly after landing. These test flights are all about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration interplanetary flights, and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

snippet.title: Este Г© o NOVO PEUGEOT 308 2021. O maior pesadelo do Volkswagen Golf?
snippet.description:
O novo Peugeot 308 acaba de ser revelado. Um modelo que espelha a ambiГ§ГЈo da Peugeot em elevar o seu posicionamento.

Uma ambiГ§ГЈo que se traduz nesta terceira geraГ§ГЈo de aparГӘncia mais sofisticada e detalhada que nunca. Quanto ao conteГәdo tecnolГіgico, ele nunca foi tГЈo extenso.

Cabe ao novo 308 ser o primeiro a mostrar o novo emblema, que surge, orgulhosamente, ao centro da expressivamente preenchida e generosa grelha dianteira. Mas tambГ©m o podemos ver nos flancos, atrГЎs da roda dianteira a fazer lembrar uma certa marca italianaвҖҰ

Demarca-se do antecessor pelos seus traГ§os estilГӯsticos mais expressivos, como pela profusГЈo de detalhes e apontamentos decorativos, mas as diferenГ§as nГЈo se ficam por aqui. O novo Peugeot 308, tal como o antecessor, assenta sobre a plataforma EMP2, ainda que esta seja uma evoluГ§ГЈo da que conhecГӯamos, com a terceira geraГ§ГЈo a crescer em praticamente todas as dimensГөes.

Гү mais comprido 110 mm (4367 mm) e a distГўncia entre eixos Г© 55 mm maior (2675 mm), e Г© ainda 48 mm mais largo (1852 mm). PorГ©m, Г© 20 mm mais baixo, tendo agora 1440 mm de altura.

As maiores dimensГөes exteriores refletem-se nas cotas internas, com a Peugeot a afirmar que existe mais espaГ§o para os joelhos dos ocupantes traseiros. No entanto, a bagageira Г© marginalmente mais pequena na nova geraГ§ГЈo: 412 l contra 420 l, mas passa a existir um compartimento de 28 l de capacidade por baixo do piso.

Como tem sido habitual desde hГЎ praticamente 10 anos, tambГ©m o interior do novo Peugeot 308 continua a ser dominado pelo i-Cockpit, onde o painel de instrumentos вҖ” sempre digital com 10вҖі e do tipo 3D a partir do nГӯvel GT вҖ” encontra-se numa posiГ§ГЈo mais elevada que o habitual, acompanhado por um volante de pequenas dimensГөes.

Queres saber mais sobre o novo Peugeot 308 2021? Acompanha todas as novidades no nosso website: https://www.razaoautomovel.com/2021/03/novo-peugeot-308-2021-apresentacao

#peugeot308 #stellantis #razaoautomovel
--

As maiores dimensГөes exteriores refletem-se nas cotas internas, com a Peugeot a afirmar que existe mais espaГ§o para os joelhos dos ocupantes traseiros. No entanto, a bagageira Г© marginalmente mais pequena na nova geraГ§ГЈo: 412 l contra 420 l, mas passa a existir um compartimento de 28 l de capacidade por baixo do piso.

Como tem sido habitual desde hГЎ praticamente 10 anos, tambГ©m o interior do novo Peugeot 308 continua a ser dominado pelo i-Cockpit, onde o painel de instrumentos вҖ” sempre digital com 10вҖі e do tipo 3D a partir do nГӯvel GT вҖ” encontra-se numa posiГ§ГЈo mais elevada que o habitual, acompanhado por um volante de pequenas dimensГөes.

Queres saber mais sobre o novo Peugeot 308 2021? Acompanha todas as novidades no nosso website: https://www.razaoautomovel.com/2021/03/novo-peugeot-308-2021-apresentacao
